---
title: "Alejandra Pachon"
subtitle: "Graphic Designer & Brand Specialist | MBA 2026"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alejandra-pachon-garzon-marketing/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:dapg_41@hotmail.com
    - icon: telephone
      text: "236-268-2203"
---

## About Me

I am a graphic designer and brand specialist with a dual degree in Graphic Design and Advertising and an MBA. I build brand systems, design digital and print assets, and create cohesive visual identities for clients across Canada and Latin America. I also co-founded Moonsbow, a digital studio where design meets engineering.
